journey.title: Started Web Development
journey.description: Began with HTML and CSS basics. Built my first static websites and learned responsive design principles.

journey.title: JavaScript Fundamentals
journey.description: Learned core JavaScript: DOM manipulation, events, async programming, and ES6+ features.

journey.title: First Portfolio Site
journey.description: Built my portfolio website with multiple projects. Focused on clean design and user experience.

journey.title: Discovered Cybersecurity
journey.description: Started exploring cybersecurity fundamentals. Completed Cisco's Cybersecurity Essentials course.

journey.title: Ethical Hacking Begins
journey.description: Started TryHackMe. Completed Pre-Security path and began learning Linux and networking.

journey.title: Web Application Security
journey.description: Connecting web dev with security. Learning OWASP Top 10 and building secure applications.

journey.title: Started Networking & Cisco
journey.description: Began studying networking fundamentals and CCNA. Learning OSI model, subnetting, and Cisco IOS through Jeremy's IT Lab and Packet Tracer.
